decision_basis: The proposed change preserves the boundary between wiki documentation and proof authority.
The proposed change makes proposal, decision, replay, and reconstruction links explicit.
The proposed change does not claim that the wiki generates receipts or replaces formalism-tests.
non_claims: ALLOW applies only to the wiki page-template change described by proposal.example.001.
ALLOW does not authorize executable transition proof.
ALLOW does not grant production accreditation.
